## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run build`
- [ ] `docker-compose config --services` or `docker compose config --services`

## Checklist

- [ ] Updated docs for API, deployment, protocol, migration, or security changes.
- [ ] Added or updated tests for business logic changes.
- [ ] Included screenshots or UI notes for frontend changes.
- [ ] Confirmed no `.env`, secrets, generated binaries, logs, or `node_modules` are included.
